## ManifestParsedEvent type

Fired when a manifest has been fetched and parsed.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type ManifestParsedEvent = {
    manifest: Manifest;
};
```
**References:** [Manifest](/reference/cmaf-lite.manifest)
